Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}At the rooftop garden, you can raise crops of vegetables. Each one will take a different amount of time to grow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You or your teammates can eat the vegetables you harvest to gain benefits that will be helpful when journeying into Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
